code:
%%{HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-10.02 — Transparency Report Lifecycle (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)

[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> DRAFT : ReportInitiated
note right of DRAFT
  Create report shell:
  • incident/ref IDs bound
  • scope, timeline, owners
  • initial checklist opened
end note

DRAFT --> DATA_GATHER : EvidenceRequested
note right of DATA_GATHER
  Collect evidence:
  • SIEM logs, ledger snapshots
  • config diffs, patches
  • governance directives
end note

DATA_GATHER --> AUTHORING : EvidenceCollected
note right of AUTHORING
  Compile narrative:
  • root cause, impact, fixes
  • timelines & tables
  • redactions planned
end note

AUTHORING --> LEGAL_REVIEW : DraftReady
LEGAL_REVIEW --> ETHICS_REVIEW : LegalCleared
ETHICS_REVIEW --> QA_REVIEW : EthicsCleared
QA_REVIEW --> SIGNING : QAApproved

%% Signing & generation
SIGNING --> GENERATED : ReportGenerated (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)
note right of GENERATED
  Immutable bundle produced:
  • hashes, signatures, timestamp
  • public & internal versions
end note

GENERATED --> PUBLISHING : PublishRequested
PUBLISHING --> PUBLISHED : TransparencyReportPublished (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)
PUBLISHED --> ARCHIVED : ArchiveScheduled
ARCHIVED --> [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]

%% Corrections / amendments
PUBLISHED --> AMEND_REQ : CorrectionRequested
AMEND_REQ --> AUTHORING : AmendmentAuthorized

%% Exceptions / failure paths
DATA_GATHER --> FAILED : MissingEvidence / HashMismatch
AUTHORING --> FAILED : IncompleteNarrative
LEGAL_REVIEW --> FAILED : LegalBlock
ETHICS_REVIEW --> FAILED : EthicsBlock
QA_REVIEW --> FAILED : QAFailed
SIGNING --> FAILED : SignatureError
PUBLISHING --> FAILED : PublishError
FAILED --> [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] : ReportAbandoned

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class DRAFT,DATA_GATHER,AUTHORING,LEGAL_REVIEW,ETHICS_REVIEW,QA_REVIEW,SIGNING,GENERATED,PUBLISHING,PUBLISHED,ARCHIVED,AMEND_REQ,FAILED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为透明报告的生命周期设计一个状态图，从HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault触发开始。整个流程要覆盖从草稿到最终归档，还要考虑合规审查和可能的修正流程。
明白了。我梳理一下主干流程：DRAFT阶段先创建报告壳，绑定事件ID和范围；然后进入DATA_GATHER收集SIEM日志和配置差异；接着AUTHORING编写根因分析和影响评估。这样理解对吗？
对，AUTHORING之后要过三道关卡：LEGAL_REVIEW法务审查、ETHICS_REVIEW伦理审查、然后是QA_REVIEW。这三道都过了才能进入SIGNING阶段。
好的，我画出了主干流程。SIGNING之后由HealthTech_LabAnalyzer生成不可变报告包，带哈希和签名，然后进入PUBLISHING，最终由HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine发布为PUBLISHED状态。
还需要两个重要分支：一是发布后如果发现错误，从PUBLISHED可以发起AMEND_REQ修正请求，授权后回到AUTHORING重新编辑；二是各阶段都可能失败，统一汇聚到FAILED状态，最终由HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine标记为废弃。
确认一下失败路径：DATA_GATHER可能因为MissingEvidence或HashMismatch失败，AUTHORING可能因为IncompleteNarrative失败，LEGAL_REVIEW和ETHICS_REVIEW也有各自的阻断条件，对吗？
没错，还有QA_REVIEW、SIGNING、PUBLISHING也都有失败可能。PUBLISHED之后还会按计划进入ARCHIVED归档，最终回到HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。

完成。我已经用橙色高亮标注了所有核心状态，包括DRAFT、DATA_GATHER、AUTHORING、LEGAL_REVIEW、ETHICS_REVIEW、QA_REVIEW、SIGNING、GENERATED、PUBLISHING、PUBLISHED、ARCHIVED、AMEND_REQ和FAILED。图标题设为SM-10.02 — Transparency Report Lifecycle (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)。
